message:
fix: use native Zig benchmarks in CI instead of Python

- Remove Python dependencies from benchmark workflow
- Run on both Linux (CPU) and macOS (Apple Silicon + GPU)
- Use bench-vector for GPU vector operation benchmarks
- Use test-parquet and test-integration for throughput tests
- Add test-logic-table for @logic_table E2E benchmarks
- Post combined results as PR comment

files.patch:
@@ -15,84 +15,125 @@ on:
       - '.github/workflows/benchmark.yml'
 
 jobs:
-  benchmark:
+  benchmark-linux:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - name: Setup Python
-        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - name: Build library
+        run: zig build lib
+
+      - name: Run Zig tests with benchmarks
+        run: |
+          echo "=== LanceQL Benchmark Results ===" > benchmark-results.txt
+          echo "Platform: Linux (CPU only)" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          echo "Date: $(date -u)" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
+
+          echo "=== Parquet Reader ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build test-parquet 2>&1 | grep -E "(Benchmark|Throughput|Avg|Min|Max|rows)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
+          echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
+
+          echo "=== Integration Tests ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build test-integration 2>&1 | grep -E "(Throughput|docs/ms|us|ms)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
+
+      - name: Upload benchmark results
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          python-version: '3.11'
+          name: benchmark-results-linux
+          path: benchmark-results.txt
+          retention-days: 30
+
+  benchmark-macos:
+    runs-on: macos-14  # Apple Silicon (M1)
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
         with:
-          version: 0.13.0
+          version: 0.15.2
 
-      - name: Install Python dependencies
-        run: |
-          pip install pyarrow lancedb polars duckdb numpy
+      - name: Build Metal shaders
+        run: zig build metal-shaders
 
-      - name: Build Zig library
+      - name: Build library
         run: zig build lib
 
-      - name: Generate test fixtures
-        run: python fixtures/generate_test_files.py
-        continue-on-error: true
+      - name: Run vector benchmark (GPU)
+        run: |
+          echo "=== LanceQL Benchmark Results ===" > benchmark-results.txt
+          echo "Platform: macOS Apple Silicon (GPU enabled)" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          echo "Date: $(date -u)" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
+
+          echo "=== Vector Operations (GPU vs CPU) ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build bench-vector 2>&1 | tee -a benchmark-results.txt
+          echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
 
-      - name: Run Zig benchmarks
-        run: zig build test-parquet 2>&1 | tee zig-benchmark.txt
-        continue-on-error: true
+      - name: Run Parquet benchmark
+        run: |
+          echo "=== Parquet Reader ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build test-parquet 2>&1 | grep -E "(Benchmark|Throughput|Avg|Min|Max|rows)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
+          echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
 
-      - name: Run Python benchmarks
-        working-directory: benchmarks
-        run: python run_all.py 2>&1 | tee ../python-benchmark.txt
-        continue-on-error: true
+      - name: Run integration tests with benchmarks
+        run: |
+          echo "=== Integration Tests ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build test-integration 2>&1 | grep -E "(Throughput|docs/ms|us|ms)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
+          echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
 
-      - name: Run Polars/DuckDB comparison
-        working-directory: benchmarks
-        run: python bench_vs_polars_duckdb.py 2>&1 | tee ../polars-duckdb-benchmark.txt
-        continue-on-error: true
+          echo "=== Logic Table E2E ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build test-logic-table 2>&1 | grep -E "(Throughput|docs/ms|us|ms|Top-)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
 
       - name: Upload benchmark results
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: benchmark-results
-          path: |
-            zig-benchmark.txt
-            python-benchmark.txt
-            polars-duckdb-benchmark.txt
-            benchmarks/benchmark_results.json
+          name: benchmark-results-macos
+          path: benchmark-results.txt
           retention-days: 30
 
+  compare-results:
+    needs: [benchmark-linux, benchmark-macos]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+    steps:
+      - name: Download Linux results
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: benchmark-results-linux
+          path: linux
+
+      - name: Download macOS results
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: benchmark-results-macos
+          path: macos
+
       - name: Comment benchmark results on PR
-        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
         uses: actions/github-script@v7
         with:
           script: |
             const fs = require('fs');
-            let comment = '## Benchmark Results\n\n';
-
-            try {
-              const zigResults = fs.readFileSync('zig-benchmark.txt', 'utf8');
-              comment += '### Zig Benchmarks\n```\n' + zigResults.slice(-2000) + '\n```\n\n';
-            } catch (e) {
-              comment += '### Zig Benchmarks\n_No results available_\n\n';
-            }
+            let comment = '## 🚀 Benchmark Results\n\n';
 
             try {
-              const pythonResults = fs.readFileSync('python-benchmark.txt', 'utf8');
-              comment += '### Python Benchmarks\n```\n' + pythonResults.slice(-2000) + '\n```\n\n';
+              const macosResults = fs.readFileSync('macos/benchmark-results.txt', 'utf8');
+              comment += '### macOS (Apple Silicon + GPU)\n```\n' + macosResults + '\n```\n\n';
             } catch (e) {
-              comment += '### Python Benchmarks\n_No results available_\n\n';
+              comment += '### macOS\n_No results available_\n\n';
             }
 
             try {
-              const compResults = fs.readFileSync('polars-duckdb-benchmark.txt', 'utf8');
-              comment += '### LanceQL vs Polars vs DuckDB\n```\n' + compResults.slice(-3000) + '\n```\n';
+              const linuxResults = fs.readFileSync('linux/benchmark-results.txt', 'utf8');
+              comment += '### Linux (CPU only)\n```\n' + linuxResults + '\n```\n';
             } catch (e) {
-              comment += '### LanceQL vs Polars vs DuckDB\n_No results available_\n';
+              comment += '### Linux\n_No results available_\n';
             }
 
             github.rest.issues.createComment({
